name: cli-discovery-prompts
description: Curated stratified subset of test-sets/default.json for the discovery experiment. Identical prompts are used across every condition (Checker Protocol §2). expectedComponents is evaluation-only and is NEVER shown to the agent (§3). Prompts are picked to span complexity so we don't over/under-state discovery: hard tasks make guessing fail, which is when discovery matters most.
selectionStrategy: stratified by complexity + category; reference default.json by id to avoid drift and answer-leak. Adjust ids after reviewing default.json; K>=5 reps per prompt per condition.
notes: IDs verified against ../test-sets/default.json. Stratified 3 simple / 3 moderate / 2 complex across distinct categories.
Do NOT copy prompt text or expectedComponents here — reference by id so the single source of truth stays default.json.
page-setup (ps-1) and data-display (dd-1) are the highest-signal for discovery: an agent that guesses layout/theming APIs will hallucinate, while one that checks the CLI won't.
